summary: Frontend testing of iteration 123 features: Sticky Master Controls Footer on Cosmic Mixer page and refactored Starseed pages (StarseedAdventure, StarseedRealm, SpiritualAvatarCreator). All pages load correctly with proper data-testid attributes. No broken imports or missing components after refactoring.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user data
